reasoning: The control SC-5-b focuses on Denial-of-Service (DoS) protection, which can be mapped to Kubernetes through network policies to restrict ingress and egress traffic, and rate limiting features to prevent resource exhaustion. NetworkPolicies can enforce default deny rules for ingress and egress, which are fundamental in mitigating DoS attacks by controlling traffic flow. Additionally, configuring rate limiting on the API server and within a service mesh can help prevent DoS by limiting the number of requests that can be processed, ensuring that the system remains responsive under load.
